name: chrV_L_subtelomere
description: L-arm subtelomeric block of C. elegans chromosome V, immediately interior to the TTAGGC telomere array. Contains strain-variable repetitive elements (TASR/HRMR-like minisatellites), CeRep59 family copies, non-LTR retrotransposon (Tc/mariner, RTE) insertions and rapidly evolving gene-poor sequence. Subtelomeres are enriched for paralogous gene-family ends (chemoreceptors, srh/sra/srg) and are mapping-difficult on short reads.
expected_copy_count: strain-variable; multiple shared subtelomeric repeats across the 12 chromosome ends
